basic_details.job_title: DWCWEO West Godavari Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Ayah, House Keeper and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: District Women Child Welfare & Empowerment Office (DWCWEO West Godavari)
basic_details.post_name: Ayah, House Keeper and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: District Women Child Welfare & Empowerment Office (DWCWEO West Godavari) Notification 2026 has been released on 27-06-2026 on the official website westgodavari.ap.gov.in. A total of 9 vacancies have been announced through the DWCWEO West Godavari Recruitment 2026 for Ayah, House Keeper, Social Worker, Central Administrator, Para Legal Personnel, Para Medical Personnel, Psycho-social Counsellor, Office Assistant, and other posts.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 25 years Maximum Age: 42 years Age relaxation details are not specified in the provided data. Please refer to the official notification for any age relaxation rules.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate in Social Work/Sociology/Social Sciences, Bachelors/Post Graduation in Social Work (MSW)/PG Diploma in Psychology/Early Childhood Care, 10th Class, Masters in Law/Social Work/Sociology/Social Science/Psychology, Degree in Law, Professional degree/diploma in paramedics, Professional degree/diploma in psychology/psychiatry/neurosciences, Graduate with diploma in computers/IT
qualification.details: Social Worker (Female-1): Graduate preferably in B.A in Social Work/ Sociology /Social Sciences from a recognized university. Weightage for work experience. Proficiency in Computers. Social Worker cum Early Childhood educator (Female-1): Bachelors / Post graduation in Social Work (MSW)/ PG diploma in Psychology/ Early Child hood Care and Development from Recognized University. At least 2 years experience and Knowledge of working on Women/ Child Protection issues including 1 year of working with Children. Experience of working with WD&CW Dept or an NGO on adoption issues will be an added advantage. Good Rapport with NGOs/ Police / Govt. Departments. Demonstrable Commitment to women and Child Concerns. Written and oral Communication Skills in English and Telugu. Ability to work on Computer and MS- Office package. Committed and no Past record of moral turpitude. Local women candidates. Ayah (Female-1): Please refer to the official notification for Ayah qualification details. House Keeper (Female-1): 10th class pass / fail, should have 3 years experience in house keeping and household duties (especially working experience in institutions). Physical Fitness Certificate required. Central Administrator (Women): Masters in Law/ Social Work/ Sociology/Social Science/Psychology with at least 5 years experience of working on women related relevant domains in an administrative set-up with a Government or Non-Government project/programme and preferably with at least 1 year experience of counseling. Preferably resident of the local community. Para Legal Personnel / Lawyer (Women): Degree in Law/with legal training or knowledge of laws with at least 3 years experience of working within a Government or Non-Government women related project/programme at the district level or practicing Lawyer with at least 2 years experience of litigation in any court of law. Local women candidates. Para Medical Personnel (Women): Professional degree/diploma in paramedics with a background in health sector and preferably with at least 3 years experience of working within a Government or Non-Government health project/programme at the district level. Local women candidates. Psycho-social Counsellor (Women): Professional degree / diploma in psychology / psychiatry / neurosciences with a background in health sector and preferably with at least 3 years experience of working within a Government or Non-Government health Project/ programme at the district level. Local women candidates. Office Assistant with computer knowledge (Women): Graduate with at least diploma in computers/ IT etc with a minimum of 3 years experience in data management, process documentation and web-based reporting formats, video conferencing at state or district level with Government or Non- Governmental/IT-based organizations. Local women candidates.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for DWCWEO West Godavari Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: westgodavari.ap.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 08-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the DWCWEO West Godavari Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download DWCWEO West Godavari Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: DWCWEO West Godavari Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for DWCWEO West Godavari Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: westgodavari.ap.gov.in. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 08-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: DWCWEO West Godavari Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the DWCWEO West Godavari recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the DWCWEO West Godavari recruitment is 08-07-2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address before this date.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the DWCWEO West Godavari posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 9 vacancies announced for various contract posts by the District Women Child Welfare & Empowerment Office (DWCWEO West Godavari).

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for the DWCWEO West Godavari recruitment is Offline. Candidates need to send their application forms to the official address mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q4. What is the minimum and maximum age limit for the DWCWEO West Godavari posts?
faq.answer: The minimum age limit for all posts is 25 years, and the maximum age limit is 42 years. Age relaxation details are not provided here.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary range for the DWCWEO West Godavari contract posts?
faq.answer: The salary for the DWCWEO West Godavari contract posts ranges from Rs. 7,944/- to Rs. 34,000/- per month, depending on the specific post.

faq.question: Q6. What are the educational qualifications required for the DWCWEO West Godavari posts?
faq.answer: The qualifications vary by post, including Graduate degrees in Social Work, Sociology, Social Sciences, Law, Psychology, and 10th class pass for certain roles. Specific details are available in the official notification.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for the DWCWEO West Godavari recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the DWCWEO West Godavari recruitment 2026.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the DWCWEO West Godavari contract posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for the DWCWEO West Godavari contract posts will involve shortlisting of applications followed by an interview.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be accessed from the official website of the District Women Child Welfare & Empowerment Office, West Godavari district, Andhra Pradesh.

faq.question: Q10. What is the official website for DWCWEO West Godavari recruitment?
faq.answer: The official website for DWCWEO West Godavari recruitment is westgodavari.ap.gov.in. Candidates should visit this site for all relevant information and updates.
